item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju bahwa penekanan pada kepentingan masyarakat bisa menimbulkan masalah jika tidak disertai mekanisme perlindungan hak dasar.

notes: Agent A starts society-priority but shifts by turn 3 toward balance and rights safeguards, then stays near a legal-implementation reform frame. Agent B remains mostly balanced but rights-enforcement oriented. Agent B turn 4 contains the non-English script term "法治" inside an English turn.
